topics.title: Code Fixes and Improvements
topics.summary: Recent code changes include the merging of PR #2328, which fixed a typo in the chart configuration attribute of FacetBarChart.vue. This correction resolves issue #2327, where a misspelled attribute led to default labels being used in the chart's context menu buttons.

topics.title: Community Contributions
topics.summary: A recent post on Bluesky highlights a $5K contribution from @t3.gg to @e18e.dev, emphasizing the potential for collaboration with @npmx.dev. This financial support aims to enhance web performance and simplicity, showcasing community engagement and investment in development.
